productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Claro Brown Casual Shoes
description: This buckaroo Claro casual shoe references the brand's signature rugged style. True to its origin from the Mexican plains, this shoe has the essence of man-about-town nonchalance. This classic pair is a sartorial masterpiece with its clog meets penny loafer styling. Wear this with denims, a tee and a structured blazer  or with corduroy trousers.UpperFull grain leather upper for added durability and styleSlip-on styling with elasticated inserts on the tongueAggressive stitch detailingLightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug FitLeather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dryWell-cushioned footbed for all-day comfortBrand logo embossed on lateral side of the heelPull loop at the heel collarMidsoleEVA midsole with shock absorbersOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant TPR outsole with an upraised heel and patterned grooves for enhanced grip and tractionShoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
